description.value:
You understand the intricacies of architecture, especially the construction of sturdy tunnels and buildings. You become trained in Crafting. If you're already trained in Crafting, you instead gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Specialty Crafting] skill feat for architecture.

You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to notice dangerous structures. This bonus applies to checks to discover mechanical and environmental traps incorporated into walls, doors, ceilings, or other parts of a structure.

If you aren't using the [[/act seek]] action or searching, the GM automatically rolls a secret check for you to notice hazards incorporated into a structure anyway. This check doesn't gain your normal circumstance bonus.

value.value: Builder Formian or Worker Formian heritage
